title: Remove and replace major welded panels on vehicles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Remove and replace major welded panels on vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to replace major welded panels

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source vehicle specifications and original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s recommended repair procedures and check against workplace instructions1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Plan work to identify methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source vehicle specifications and original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s recommended repair procedures and check against workplace instructions1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Plan work to identify methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source vehicle specifications and original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s recommended repair procedures and check against workplace instructions1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Plan work to identify methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to replace major welded panels

elements.title: Remove welded panels

pcs.text: Remove major welded panels and sections according to OEM or authorised agency’s approved methods and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Drill out spot welds using recommended drill bit and drill diameters2.3 Seek assistance from authorised personnel where removal of welded panels and sections disturbs vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove major welded panels and sections according to OEM or authorised agency’s approved methods and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Drill out spot welds using recommended drill bit and drill diameters2.3 Seek assistance from authorised personnel where removal of welded panels and sections disturbs vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove major welded panels and sections according to OEM or authorised agency’s approved methods and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Drill out spot welds using recommended drill bit and drill diameters2.3 Seek assistance from authorised personnel where removal of welded panels and sections disturbs vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Remove welded panels

elements.title: Replace and align welded panels

pcs.text: Replace, align and weld panel sections using approved OEM or authorised agency’s methods and procedures3.2 Carry out replacement, alignment and welding of panel section to pre-paint condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Replace, align and weld panel sections using approved OEM or authorised agency’s methods and procedures3.2 Carry out replacement, alignment and welding of panel section to pre-paint condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Replace, align and weld panel sections using approved OEM or authorised agency’s methods and procedures3.2 Carry out replacement, alignment and welding of panel section to pre-paint condition.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Replace and align welded panels

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes
